validated_surface: source.type=http_file with format=avro is classified as renderable with warnings
source.type=http_file with format=json is classified as renderable with warnings
source.type=http_file with format=csv is classified as renderable with warnings
source.type=http_file with format=orc is classified as renderable with warnings
source.type=http_file with format=parquet is classified as renderable with warnings
source.type=http_file with format=text is classified as renderable with warnings
source.type=http_file without supported format remains review-required
Secret Manager placeholder-backed authenticated http_file follows the shared credential boundary
render_gcp_contract emits BigQuery source_materialization plans for declared tabular formats
text format maps lines to a declared string column before local NDJSON load
avro, orc and parquet formats pass fetched bytes directly to BigQuery local load jobs
validation_commands: uv run pytest tests/test_gcp_smoke.py tests/test_gcp_adapter.py tests/test_adapter_source_support.py tests/test_gcp_capability_parity_docs.py -q

required_before_promotion: Run real GCP BigQuery smokes for http_file avro/csv/json/orc/parquet/text contracts.
Read back target rows and run/lineage/quality evidence from BigQuery.
Keep undeclared or unsupported HTTP files review-required until a parser contract exists.
